Tools

Tools to size, scope, and justify your project.

Use these interactive tools to estimate coverage, calculate ROI, and prepare your asset audit.

Coverage Calculator

How many assets can SAM4 cover? Map your motor fleet and see which assets qualify for ESA monitoring.

Interactive
Launch Tool →

ROI Calculator

What's the business case? Input your downtime costs and fleet size to get a custom ROI estimate.

Coming soon
Coming Soon →

Asset Audit

What should you monitor first? Request a free audit of your rotating equipment to prioritize monitoring.

Free consultation
Request Audit →

How to Get Started

1

Try a Tool

Use one of our calculators to understand your opportunity. No sign-up required.

→
2

Talk to an Expert

Schedule a quick call to discuss your specific needs and learn about your options.

→
3

Start Monitoring

Deploy SAM4 with confidence and begin detecting faults before they fail.

Not sure where to start?

Our team can help you choose the right tools and path for your organization.

Contact Us

See how SAM4 monitors the assets your sensors can't reach.
